data.title: HyperLiquid Trader Liquidated for $100 Million After Bitcoin Bet Unravels
data.description:
A highly leveraged Bitcoin position on Hyperliquid was liquidated for over $100 million on Thursday, despite the asset's limited movement.
source: https://decrypt.co/322938/hyperliquid-trader-liquidated-100-million-bitcoin-bet-unravels

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETF had a total net outflow of US$359 million yesterday, ending a 10-day streak of net inflows
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (May 29, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$359 million.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Blackrock ETF IBIT, with a net inflow of US$125 million in a single day. Currently, IBIT's total net inflow in history has reached US$49.00 billion.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Fidelity ETF FBTC, with a net outflow of US$166 million in a single day. Currently, FBTC's total net inflow in history has reached US$11.62 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$128.127 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to total Bitcoin market value) reached 6.07%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$44.985 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net inflow of $91.9299 million yesterday, continuing its net inflow for 9 consecutive days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (May 29, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Ethereum spot ETFs was US$91.9299 million.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Blackrock ETF ETHA, with a single-day net inflow of US$50.4452 million. Currently, ETHA's total net inflow has reached US$4.535 billion.
The second is Fidelity ETF FETH, with a single-day net inflow of US$38.307 million. Currently, FETH's total net inflow has reached US$1.512 billion.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Grayscale Ethereum Trust ETF ETHE, with a single-day net outflow of US$4.6179 million. Currently, ETHE's total net outflow has reached US$4.29 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of the Ethereum spot ETF is US$9.632 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Ethereum) is 3.02%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$2.975 billion.

data.title: OKX Wallet launched Cryptopedia’s 34th Echo protocol special event
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, OKX Wallet has launched the 34th Echo protocol special event on Cryptopedia. The event will be held from 15:00 on May 29, 2025 to 15:00 on June 28, 2025 (UTC+8). During this period, users can complete and verify the interactive tasks of the Echo protocol through Cryptopedia, and have the opportunity to share a token reward worth 1 million USDT.

data.title: Opinion: Actual savings from Musk's DOGE unit may be far less than $10 billion
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Yesterday, Musk posted on X, "As my time as a special government employee is coming to an end, I want to thank President Trump for giving me this opportunity to cut wasteful spending. The mission of the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) will only strengthen over time because it will become a way of life for the entire government."
Analysis points out that advisory committees such as DOGE have no power to cut federal spending, close agencies or cancel contracts. Their recommendations must be implemented by the president or appointed officials, and most cost-cutting measures require congressional legislation. This means that Trump should have promoted legislation to legalize DOGE reforms, but he did not do so. The budget recently passed by the House of Representatives only approved $9.3 billion in agency cuts, less than 5% of Musk's initial $2 trillion annual cost-cutting target.
"DOGE is a big deal," said Jessica Riedl, a budget analyst at the Manhattan Institute. "The actual cost-cutting may be far less than $10 billion."
Political reality has exposed the essence of DOGE. This may be just a superficial cost-cutting show, and the "stubborn disease" of the federal budget has not been moved at all. Members of Congress have a firm grip on the various agencies of the executive branch, and even Republicans are reluctant to let "vigilantes" like Musk interfere with their territory. (Jin Shi)

data.title: Binance Alpha to List LayerEdge (EDGEN), Airdrop Claim Opens June 2
data.description: Binance Alpha has officially announced the upcoming listing of LayerEdge (EDGEN), a decentralized network built on Bitcoin infrastructure. Trading for EDGEN is scheduled to open on June 2, 2025, with full listing details and market access expected to be published on the same day.Airdrop for Eligible Binance Alpha UsersTo celebrate the listing, Binance Alpha will launch an exclusive airdrop event for eligible users. Participants will be able to claim EDGEN tokens using Binance Alpha Points via the Alpha event page, which will also go live on June 2.Further information on the airdrop allocation, claim process, and participation requirements will be made available upon the event page launch.

data.title: Story Ecosystem Music Tokenization Platform MUSIC Launches DRIP, a Token for Top 100 DJs’ Hot Singles, and 20% of the Supply is Airdropped
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News MUSIC officially released the on-chain asset DRIP of the single "Drip Drip" created by Top 100 DJ R3HAB. According to the token economic model, 20% of the supply will be used for the first round of airdrops, and the snapshot has been completed. At present, the platform has completed the migration from Base to Story chain, supporting MUSIC one-click cross-chain. The transaction will use Story's native token IP as the Gas fee.
This model realizes the on-chain confirmation and real-time profit sharing of music IP, and artists can obtain income through 1% transaction share, licensing fees and derivative share. R3HAB and Sony Tencent joint venture label have received 15% token allocation, and the rest will be used for community incentives. This launch marks an important progress in the innovative application of music assets in the Web3 field, providing creators with a new monetization channel

data.title: Binance Alpha to Launch LayerEdge (EDGEN)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance Alpha will become the first platform to launch LayerEdge (EDGEN), and the trading opening date is June 2, and the specific time will be announced later.
In addition, eligible users need to use Alpha points to claim the airdrop on the Alpha event page. The event page and details will be launched on June 2.

data.title: Glassnode: BlackRock and Fidelity Ethereum ETF investors have an average loss of 21%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Glassnode stated in a report that investors in BlackRock and Fidelity's spot Ethereum ETFs are currently facing significant losses, with an average unrealized loss of about 21%. Data shows that the cost basis of BlackRock's spot Ethereum ETF is $3,300, while Fidelity's is higher at $3,500. ETH is currently trading at around $2,601.
Meanwhile, Glassnode said these ETFs have little impact on Ethereum’s spot price. “The Ethereum ETF initially accounted for only about 1.5% of spot market volume, indicating that the market response to the ETF launch was relatively muted.”

data.title: Backpack issues airdrops to platinum users
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Backpack announced on the X platform that it has issued airdrops to users in the platinum rank of the first season. In addition, Backpack said that the empowerment of points is still in the early stages, and there will be more incentives and usage scenarios in the future.
Earlier news, Backpack launched its first activity module "Daily Trading Competition". This gameplay is a daily refresh challenge task. There is no need to register. Users who participate in trading volume and profit activities can automatically participate in the prize pool distribution. The daily prize pool is 50,000-100,000 US dollars. Among them, the top 1,000 users in trading volume and the top 500 users in profit will receive 50% of the prize pool incentive, and the remaining users will be allocated another 50% of the prize pool in proportion to their trading volume and profit and loss.

data.title: Thailand bans five major crypto exchanges amid crackdown on unlicensed platforms
data.description:
30-5-2025 – Thailand’s financial watchdog has delivered a decisive blow to the cryptocurrency sector, moving to sever local access to five major digital asset trading platforms. The Securities and Exchange Commission announced that crypto exchanges Bybit, 1000X, CoinEx, OKX and XT will be banned locally starting June 28, marking a significant escalation in the country’s [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/thailand-bans-five-major-crypto-exchanges-amid-crackdown-on-unlicensed-platforms/
